title: Restaurant Dialogue — Gọi món ở nhà hàng

sentences.text: This is a shadowing exercise I will say a whole conversation
Then repeat it with pauses between sentences
For you to repeat try to copy the pronunciation
The intonation and stress I heard there's a lunch special on pot
Pies today that's right two for one any sides come with that steamed
Asparagus and a roll you guys wouldn't happen to have a
Vegetarian option on the pot pies would you sorry normally we do but the specials
Are pre-made with chicken that's fine I'll just order my wife a salad or something
Can I get another minute with the menu then of course any drinks while you decide
Got any tea left we're brewing another batch it should be
Right up lemon yeah I'll take a slice thanks
I heard there's a lunch special on pot pies today
That's right two for one any sides come with that steamed
Asparagus and a roll
You guys wouldn't happen to have a vegetarian option on the pot pies would you
Sorry normally we do but the specials are pre-made with chicken
That's fine I'll just order my wife a salad or something can I get another
Minute with the menu then
Of course any drinks while you decide
Got any tea left we're brewing another batch it should be
Right up lemon yeah I'll take a slice thanks
